title: she: eliminate defensive to_vec() for read-only C *mut u8 args
description: she.rs: she_secure_boot, she_extend_seed, she_enc_ecb, she_dec_ecb, she_enc_cbc, she_dec_cbc, she_generate_mac, she_verify_mac all clone the caller's &[u8] into a fresh Vec solely because the C API declares *mut u8 even though it does not mutate the data. Fix: cast as_ptr() as *mut u8 with a SAFETY comment confirming no mutation. Eliminates one O(n) heap allocation + memcopy per call — matters most for she_secure_boot (full bootloader image) and the cipher functions (large AES payloads).
